item.name: Yok Huy Toad
item.description:
Owing, perhaps, to its large eyes, this amphibian is said to bear more than a passing resemblance to the mountain giants it shares its name with.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: After observing the similarity between this creature's large eyes and those of the Yok Huy, one eager Wing of Reflection researcher posited the existence of a shared ancestor. Alas, there proved to be no tangible link, leaving the young naturalist rather deflated.
